insights.message: Low capital efficiency — ROE 4.4% (<10%) in FY2025
Thin profit margins — NPM 2.1% in FY2025
Profits are cash-backed — CFO/Net Profit ratio 5.96x in FY2025

anomalies.message: Net profit fell -60.2% YoY in FY2025 — significant earnings deterioration
Net profit fell -80.0% YoY in FY2023 — significant earnings deterioration
Total debt surged +49.5% YoY in FY2023 — significant leverage increase
